elevator_pitch: I build AI chatbots and automation systems that save small businesses 20+ hours per week. From website chatbots that capture leads 24/7, to custom Python scripts that eliminate repetitive tasks — I deliver working solutions in 2-7 days.

freelancer.headline: AI Chatbot Developer & Python Automation Expert
freelancer.bio:
I build AI chatbots and automation tools that save businesses time and money.

What I deliver:
- Website chatbots (FAQ, lead capture, appointment booking)
- WhatsApp/Telegram bots for customer support
- Python automation (reports, data pipelines, web scraping)
- AI workflows (n8n, Make, Zapier integrations)

My process:
1. You tell me what you need
2. I scope it and quote a fixed price
3. I build and deliver in 2-7 days
4. You get free revisions until you're happy

I use AI to work fast, and I'm transparent about it. You get quality results at a fraction of the cost of a traditional dev shop.

Chat only — no calls. Fast replies during ET business hours.

portfolio_items.title: AI Website Chatbot — Lead Capture + FAQ
portfolio_items.description: Built a website chatbot for a real estate agency. Handles property questions, captures buyer leads, schedules showings. Reduced response time from 4 hours to instant.

portfolio_items.title: Automated Data Pipeline — CSV to Dashboard
portfolio_items.description: Python automation that pulls sales data from 3 sources, cleans and merges it, generates weekly reports. Replaced 6 hours of manual Excel work.

portfolio_items.title: Web Scraper — Real Estate Listings
portfolio_items.description: Custom scraper that monitors property listings across 5 sites, alerts client when new properties match criteria. Handles pagination, anti-bot measures, deduplication.

portfolio_items.title: Telegram Bot — Appointment Scheduler
portfolio_items.description: Telegram bot for a salon that handles bookings, sends reminders, manages waitlist. Integrated with Google Calendar.

gigs.title: I will build an AI chatbot for your website or business
gigs.description:
Get a custom AI chatbot that works 24/7 for your business.

What you get:
- AI-powered chatbot that answers customer questions
- Lead capture (name, email, phone)
- Appointment/booking integration
- Embeddable on any website (1 line of code)
- Mobile-friendly design

Perfect for:
- Real estate agents
- Dental offices, salons, gyms
- Restaurants
- Any service business

I use Python + AI to build fast, reliable chatbots. Delivered as a working solution you can embed on your site today.

Message me with your business type and I'll send you a custom demo.

basic.name: Starter Bot
basic.includes: FAQ bot + lead capture + email alerts

standard.name: Pro Bot
standard.includes: Custom knowledge base + CRM integration + booking system

premium.name: Enterprise Bot
premium.includes: Full custom + CRM sync + analytics + priority support + monthly optimization

faq.a: No. I handle everything. You just paste one line of code on your website.

faq.q: Can it integrate with my CRM?
faq.a: Yes — HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho, or any CRM with an API.

faq.q: What if I need changes later?
faq.a: I offer monthly maintenance plans starting at $100/mo. Or you can order one-time updates.

faq.q: Do you use AI tools to build this?
faq.a: Yes, I use AI to accelerate development. This means faster delivery and lower cost for you. Full transparency.

gigs.title: I will automate your repetitive tasks with Python
gigs.description:
Stop wasting hours on repetitive work. I'll build a Python script that does it for you.

What I automate:
- Data entry and processing
- Report generation (Excel, PDF, CSV)
- Web scraping and monitoring
- API integrations between tools
- File management and organization
- Email parsing and routing

How it works:
1. Tell me what you do manually today
2. I build a Python script that does it automatically
3. You run it with one click (or schedule it)

I've automated workflows for real estate agencies, e-commerce stores, marketing teams, and more.

premium.name: Enterprise Solution
premium.includes: Complex pipeline + dashboard + monitoring + ongoing support

faq.q: What if my task is complex?
faq.a: Message me first. I'll assess it and give you an honest quote. If it's beyond scope, I'll tell you.

faq.q: Can it run on a schedule?
faq.a: Yes. I can set it up to run daily, weekly, or on any schedule you need.
I'll provide clear setup instructions. For hosted solutions, I can deploy it so you don't need anything installed.

upwork.headline: AI Chatbot Developer | Python Automation | Web Scraping
upwork.overview:
I build AI-powered tools that save small businesses time and money.

My core services:
1. AI Chatbots — Website bots that answer questions, capture leads, book appointments. Delivered in 2-7 days.
2. Python Automation — Scripts that eliminate repetitive tasks. Reports, data processing, API integrations.
3. Web Scraping — Custom scrapers for any website. Monitoring, alerts, data pipelines.
4. AI Workflows — n8n/Make/Zapier integrations connecting your business tools.

Why work with me:
- Fixed pricing, no surprises
- Fast delivery (2-7 days for most projects)
- I use AI to work faster — you benefit from lower costs
- Chat-only communication (fast replies, no lengthy calls)
- Free revisions until you're satisfied

I'm transparent about using AI tools in my workflow. This means you get higher quality work delivered faster at a better price.

Industries I've served: Real estate, dental, salons, restaurants, e-commerce, marketing agencies.

Message me with what you need and I'll send a fixed-price quote within 24 hours.

linkedin.note: Max handles LinkedIn content. Profile needs manual setup.
linkedin.headline: AI Chatbot Developer | Helping Small Businesses Automate with AI
linkedin.about:
I build AI chatbots and automation systems for small businesses.

Most small business owners waste 10-20 hours per week on tasks a bot could handle — answering the same questions, scheduling appointments, processing data, generating reports.

I fix that.

My agency (Darkcode AI) delivers:
- Website chatbots that capture leads 24/7
- Appointment booking bots for service businesses
- Python automation for repetitive workflows
- Web scraping and data pipelines

Fixed pricing. Fast delivery. No fluff.

If you run a small business and want to automate something, DM me.
featured_post_ideas: How I built a chatbot that captures 3x more leads for a real estate agency
The real cost of NOT automating: 20 hours/week x $30/hr = $31,200/year wasted
I use AI to build AI tools. Here's why that's a good thing for my clients.

key_differentiators: Fixed pricing — no hourly billing surprises
social_proof_targets: First 3 clients: offer 50% discount for testimonial rights
Build 2-3 demo bots as portfolio pieces (live demos)
Document case studies from each delivery
